name: Creamed Pheasant
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the pheasant and cut into serving pieces.
2. Soak in very cold water for 2 hours, if desired.
3. Roll the pieces in seasoned flour (salt and pepper) to coat.
4. In a Dutch oven, brown the meat slowly on both sides, turning once.
5. Add onions and cover with 1 cup of water.
6. Bring to a simmer and cook tightly covered until tender, about 1 hour and 20 minutes.
7. Pour in the light cream and continue cooking for another 10-15 minutes.
8. Serve with dumplings.
